name: Retell Insurance Agent — Post Call Processor

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ summary: $json.event_summary, description: $json.event_description, start: { dateTime: $json.event_start, timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles' }, end: { dateTime: $json.event_end, timeZone: 'America/Los_Angeles' }, attendees: $json.attendee_email ? [{ email: $json.attendee_email }] : [], reminders: { useDefault: false, overrides: [{ method: 'email', minutes: 60 }, { method: 'popup', minutes: 15 }] } }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.coverage_type_requested + ' Appointment is Confirmed!' }}
parameters.message:
=

Appointment Confirmed

Hi {{ $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.caller_name }},

Thank you for your interest! Your {{ $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.coverage_type_requested }} consultation has been scheduled.

Date: {{ $('Prepare Appointment').item.json.event_start }}

A licensed insurance advisor will be ready to discuss your coverage options in detail.

If you need to reschedule, please call us or reply to this email.


Best regards,
Insurance Advisory Team

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.from_number, message: 'Hi ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.caller_name + '! Your ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.coverage_type_requested + ' appointment is confirmed. A licensed advisor will call you at the scheduled time. Reply STOP to opt out.' }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your Callback is Scheduled — ' + $json.coverage_type_requested }}
parameters.message:
=

Callback Scheduled

Hi {{ $json.caller_name }},

As requested, we've scheduled a callback to discuss your {{ $json.coverage_type_requested }} coverage needs.

Scheduled Date: {{ $json.callback_date || 'We will contact you soon' }}

Scheduled Time: {{ $json.callback_scheduled_time || 'During business hours' }}

Reason: {{ $json.call_back_reason || 'Follow-up consultation' }}

A licensed insurance advisor will reach out at the scheduled time.


Best regards,
Insurance Advisory Team

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.from_number, message: 'Hi ' + $json.caller_name + '! Your callback has been scheduled for ' + ($json.callback_date || 'soon') + '. We will reach out to discuss your ' + $json.coverage_type_requested + ' coverage. Reply STOP to opt out.' }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Thank You for Your Interest — ' + $json.coverage_type_requested }}
parameters.message:
=

Thank You for Your Interest!

Hi {{ $json.caller_name }},

Thank you for taking the time to learn about {{ $json.coverage_type_requested }} coverage options.

We'd love to help you find the right plan. When you're ready, simply reply to this email or call us back to speak with a licensed advisor.

In the meantime, here are some resources that may be helpful:

  • Understanding your coverage options
  • How to compare insurance plans
  • Frequently asked questions

Best regards,
Insurance Advisory Team

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.from_number, message: 'Hi ' + $json.caller_name + '! Thank you for your interest in ' + $json.coverage_type_requested + '. Reply YES to connect with a licensed advisor, or call us anytime. Reply STOP to opt out.' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.from_number, message: 'Hi ' + $json.caller_name + ', we tried reaching you regarding insurance coverage options. Please call us back at your convenience or reply CALLBACK to schedule a time. Reply STOP to opt out.' }) }}

parameters.subject: ={{ 'Your Advisor Transfer is Complete — ' + $json.coverage_type_requested }}
parameters.message:
=

Advisor Transfer Complete

Hi {{ $json.caller_name }},

You were successfully connected with a licensed insurance advisor regarding your {{ $json.coverage_type_requested }} inquiry.

If you have any additional questions or need to follow up, please don't hesitate to reach out.


Best regards,
Insurance Advisory Team

parameters.message:
=

Caller{{ $json.caller_name }}
Phone{{ $json.from_number }}
Email{{ $json.caller_email }}

Coverage Type{{ $json.coverage_type_requested }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: '+15105204265', message: '[ADMIN] New insurance call processed — ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.caller_name + ' | Disposition: ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.lead_disposition + ' | Coverage: ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.coverage_type_requested + ' | Sentiment: ' + $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.customer_sentiment }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Post-call data processed successfully', call_id: $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.call_id, disposition: $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.normalized_disposition, processed_at: $('Parse Retell Data').item.json.processed_at }) }}

parameters.content:
## Retell Insurance Post-Call Workflow

**Webhook receives Retell post-call data** → **Parses & normalizes all 15 PCDR variables** → **Logs to Google Sheets** → **Routes by lead_disposition** → **Triggers appropriate actions**

### Disposition Routes:
1. **Appointment Booked** → Google Calendar + Email + SMS
2. **Callback Scheduled** → Email + SMS confirmation
3. **Interested** → Nurture email + SMS
4. **Not Interested** → Opt-out logged (TCPA compliant, no contact)
5. **Voicemail** → SMS follow-up
6. **Transfer Completed** → Confirmation email
7. **Unknown/Fallback** → Admin alert email

### Credentials to configure:
- Google Sheets OAuth2
- Gmail OAuth2
- Google Calendar OAuth2
- SMS API (Header Auth)

### Admin: mayankchitraksh@gmail.com / +15105204265

## TCPA Compliance Note

**Not Interested / Opt-Out path intentionally does NOT send any email or SMS.** The prospect declined — TCPA requires no further automated contact.

Voicemail path sends ONE follow-up SMS with opt-out language.

parameters.subject: ={{ '[ERROR] Retell Insurance Post-Call Workflow Failed — ' + $json.execution?.id }}
parameters.message:
=

Workflow Error

The Retell Insurance Post-Call workflow encountered an error.

Execution ID: {{ $json.execution?.id }}

Error Node: {{ $json.execution?.error?.node?.name || 'Unknown' }}

Error Message: {{ $json.execution?.error?.message || 'No error message' }}

Please check the n8n execution log for details.
